title: nephrodium dryopteris
intro: Nephrodium dryopteris, also known as the male fern or ostrich fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the Osmundaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for its emetic and purgative properties, which help to induce vomiting and bowel movements. The medicinal properties of Nephrodium dryopteris have been found to have various health benefits, including treating digestive issues, such as constipation and indigestion, as well as reducing inflammation and fever. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be used in the form of tincture or powder in various herbal preparations.
